privacy_boundary: Raw chat bodies, personal data and attachments are not committed. This registry stores counts, hashes, project IDs, names and evidence boundaries only.
completion_boundary: This proves extraction and denominator accounting for the accessible June 2026 export. It does not prove every message has been classified into canonical requirements or implemented in runtime.
